title: This Open Source Repo Just Solved Claude Code's #1 Problem
summary: Graphify is an open source tool that creates knowledge graphs from code to solve memory limitations when working with large codebases. It provides a non-RAG alternative for organizing and storing code information, enabling more efficient token usage and accurate responses.
